# ProCoder — Children's Learning Platform
# https://procoder.com

## About
ProCoder is an online learning platform for children ages 6–18, offering interactive courses in Programming, Robotics, Algorithms, Arabic Language, and Quran Studies. We provide live online classes with qualified instructors in small groups (4–8 students) or 1-on-1 sessions.

## Target Audience
- Children ages 6–18
- Parents looking for STEM education, Arabic language, and Quran courses
- Families in GCC (Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman), Turkey, Syria, Canada, United States, and Europe

## Languages
- English
- Arabic (full RTL support)

## Courses Offered

### Programming
- Scratch Programming (Ages 6–9, Beginner) — Visual block-based coding, animations, games
- Python for Kids (Ages 10–13, Beginner) — Real programming with Python, build games
- Web Development (Ages 14–18, Intermediate) — HTML, CSS, JavaScript, responsive web apps
- Game Development (Ages 12–16, Intermediate) — 2D game design, characters, levels, publishing

### Robotics
- Robot Builders (Ages 8–12, Beginner) — Build and program robots, sensors, motors
- Advanced Robotics (Ages 13–18, Intermediate) — Autonomous navigation, AI concepts, competition prep

### Algorithms
- Algorithm Adventures (Ages 10–13, Beginner) — Sorting, searching, problem-solving through puzzles
- Competitive Programming (Ages 14–18, Advanced) — Data structures, dynamic programming, IOI/ICPC prep

### Arabic Language
- Arabic Reading & Writing (Ages 6–9, Beginner) — Letters, vocabulary, handwriting, calligraphy
- Arabic Grammar (Ages 10–14, Intermediate) — Grammar rules, verb conjugation, composition

### Quran Studies
- Quran Recitation (Ages 6–12, Beginner) — Tajweed rules, proper pronunciation, guided recitation
- Quran Memorization (Ages 10–18, Intermediate) — Structured Hifz program, revision methods

## Key Features
- Live online classes with certified instructors
- Small group sizes (max 8:1 ratio) or 1-on-1 sessions
- AI-powered smart course recommendation system
- Interactive coding environments (browser-based, no installation)
- Gamified progress tracking with badges and certificates
- Parent dashboard with real-time progress reports
- Free trial class available
- Session recordings available in dashboard
- Flexible scheduling and rescheduling
- COPPA compliant, child-safe platform

## Class Format
- Live online via video conferencing
- Self-paced recorded options available
- In-person sessions available in select locations
- Hybrid (online + in-person) options

## Schedule
- Flexible day selection (any day of the week)
- Morning (8–12), Afternoon (12–4), Evening (4–8), or Flexible timing
- Multiple timezone support (AST, GST, EET, CET, GMT, EST, PST)

## Pricing
- Free trial class with no obligation
- Sibling discount: 15% off second child
- Quarterly and annual plans with savings
- Contact for personalized pricing

## Contact
- Email: hello@procoder.com
- Website: https://procoder.com
- Languages: English, Arabic

## Pages
- Home: /en or /ar
- All Courses: /en/courses or /ar/courses
- Smart Recommendation: /en/recommend or /ar/recommend
- About Us: /en/about or /ar/about
- Contact: /en/contact or /ar/contact
- Privacy Policy: /en/privacy or /ar/privacy
- Terms & Conditions: /en/terms or /ar/terms
